Hey guys, welcome back to this final lesson within the welcome module. I really just want to record this final piece. You know, you're sitting here, you've just invested, you have this program on your lap and you're probably ready to go. But I think it's important to just take a few minutes and talk about how you can get the most ROI out of it because that's kind of really what it's all about. So the first thing I really want to touch upon is that this isn't so much a course as it is an implementation program. So therefore it's really going to be best if you're using it with a product or with a project, sorry, or a launch or funnel that you already have in mind. You know, maybe it's an evergreen funnel you already have going that you can optimize. So you know, this really isn't meant to be a theoretical dump. It's meant to arm you with the tools to put into immediate profitable action for either yourself or a client. So if you are using this program to build upon or improve or optimize any of your existing launch funnels, then you're fully invited to just dive into whatever section will serve you most right now. You know, so in some cases, just going through module seven and adding a powerful closing email from our theme plate pack will be enough to give you a huge instant win. And from there, you can track back to modules one and two and really dive deeper into some of the underlying principles that are fueling that success. But whatever you do, the goal really is to 10X your investment, you know, to 10X your investment with a few hits of the send button. So we're not looking, you know, to 10X your investment in a year from now, we're looking to get that immediate crunchy win if it's available. And then, you know, over the lifetime of you using this over everything you use, everything you use this course for, every new product launch, every new client you take on, really to magnify that more and more over time. But if you are starting from scratch and really using this program to build out your first minimum viable email funnel, then you will probably want to go section through section to make sure you're building a cohesive synergistic narrative from sub sequence to sub sequence and that you're really not missing any key steps in coaching that conversion. So that's how it's really going to round out and work. You know, modules three through seven are really going to be where we break down each sub sequence. We're really going to do a deep dive video that talks about what its job is in the overall conversion and how to execute it, how to actually coach those behaviors and attitudes and shifts in a simple and powerful way. And from there, you're going to actually be going into your workbooks where we have a set of key guiding questions that will help really draw out and extract the messaging needed for that particular section. And then finally, you're going to be invited to write the emails, you know, that whole execution thing. And you could either do this on your own. If you're feeling confident to do so, you know, making sure you really hit those beats that we talked about in the main lesson or to speed things up, you can choose from one of our proven email theme plates that I'm going to be walking you through. So that's one way to approach it. If you actually have access to six bigger emails, I'm going to point you in reference throughout where there are even additional theme plates you might want to take a look at and consider. And really, the way we're going to approach this is, you know, from a place of not this notion, this vague notion of overarching global mastery, but outcome based mastery. You know, it's important to remember right now that this program isn't about making you the best copywriter in the world. You know, let that sink in. So many entrepreneurs, experts and course creators struggle because when they start to write copy or learn how to write copy, they're trying to gain complete mastery. You know, so they're reading the classics, they're writing out old sales letters by hand and all of it does have its place. The only problem is it's kind of out of line with what your ultimate goal is, you know, which is to get more sales and create more impact out of your program, your funnel, your launch. So, you know, it's all those other methods are great. And, you know, it's not knocking mastery at all, but it's really about, you know, getting the most bang for your buck, getting kind of the most value out of your time, getting the most return out of your effort, you know, and to do that, we really need to integrate learning about copy within the realm of launches and building these funnels, you know, not as a distant siloed off activity, but something that is actually extremely relevant to what you are trying to do right now. Because that is the biggest challenge I hear all the time is, you know, well-meaning entrepreneurs and course creators will learn copy off in the distance, you know, doing all these old school methods, and then they'll try to drag it over, you know, drag it over to the funnel they're trying to build, and it just doesn't translate so seamlessly. So, that is what this is going to be about. It's about outcome-based mastery. It's giving you the tools, the copywriting tools, the skills, the email, the email teamplates, all needed to do one thing and one thing only, which is to execute your launches and your funnels with more confidence and more revenue.
